description: Tasks involving pickup and delivery of items, documents, or small packages within local area

tasks.title: Deliver Legal Documents - Law Office to Courthouse
tasks.description: Pick up sealed legal documents from Patterson Law Office (123 Attorney St) and deliver to County Courthouse filing window by 3 PM today. Time-sensitive court filing deadline.
tasks.location_hint: Patterson Law Office to County Courthouse, downtown area

evidence_schema.description: Package pickup confirmation at law office
Delivery receipt from courthouse filing clerk
Pickup and delivery times with any special instructions followed

tasks.title: Pickup Prescription - Elderly Assistance
tasks.description: Pick up prescription medication for elderly resident Mrs. Johnson at Riverside Pharmacy (456 Oak St) and deliver to her apartment at Sunset Manor (789 Elm Ave, Apt 12B).
tasks.location_hint: Riverside Pharmacy to Sunset Manor senior living

evidence_schema.description: Prescription bag pickup (without personal information visible)
Delivery confirmation from recipient or authorized person
Delivery completed successfully with recipient confirmation

tasks.title: Deliver Birthday Cake - Surprise Party
tasks.description: Pick up custom birthday cake from Sweet Dreams Bakery (321 Sugar St) at 2 PM and deliver to birthday party at Community Center (654 Park Ave) by 3:30 PM. Handle with care!
tasks.location_hint: Sweet Dreams Bakery to Community Center

evidence_schema.description: Cake pickup and secure transport setup
Cake delivered in good condition
Pickup time, delivery time, cake condition upon delivery

tasks.title: Return Rental Equipment - Same Day Service
tasks.description: Pick up carpet cleaner from residential customer (147 Maple Dr) and return to Action Rental (852 Industrial Blvd) before 5 PM to avoid late fees.
tasks.location_hint: Maple Dr residential to Action Rental industrial area

evidence_schema.description: Equipment condition at pickup
Return receipt from rental company
Equipment returned on time and in acceptable condition

tasks.title: Deliver Repair Parts - Auto Shop Emergency
tasks.description: Auto shop needs urgent brake pads for customer's car. Pick up parts from AutoZone (963 Commerce St) and deliver to Mike's Garage (741 Service Rd) ASAP.
tasks.location_hint: AutoZone to Mike's Garage, automotive district

evidence_schema.description: Parts package at pickup
Delivery receipt from garage mechanic
Urgent delivery completed, part numbers confirmed correct

tasks.title: Pickup Dry Cleaning - Business Professional
tasks.description: Pick up business suits and dress shirts from Premier Cleaners (258 Fashion Ave) and deliver to office building at 159 Corporate Plaza, Suite 420. Professional appearance required.
tasks.location_hint: Fashion Ave to Corporate Plaza business district

evidence_schema.description: Dry cleaning pickup with order number visible
Delivery confirmation from office recipient
Professional delivery completed, items in perfect condition

tasks.title: Deliver Art Supplies - Art Class Emergency
tasks.description: Art teacher needs supplies urgently. Pick up canvases and paint from Art World (456 Creative St) and deliver to Lincoln Elementary School art room before 1 PM class starts.
tasks.location_hint: Art World to Lincoln Elementary School

evidence_schema.description: Art supplies package at pickup
School office or teacher delivery receipt
Supplies delivered before class time, teacher satisfied

tasks.title: Key Exchange Service - Real Estate Closing
tasks.description: Pick up house keys from seller at 789 Willow Lane and deliver to real estate agent at Century 21 office (321 Realty Row) for property closing tomorrow.
tasks.location_hint: Willow Lane residential to Century 21 office

evidence_schema.description: Key handoff with seller (keys only, no personal info)
Real estate agent receipt for keys
Secure key transfer completed, chain of custody maintained

tasks.title: Deliver Lunch Order - Office Team
tasks.description: Pick up catered lunch order from Italian Garden Restaurant (654 Pasta Ave) and deliver to marketing team at Tech Solutions office (987 Innovation Dr, 3rd floor) by noon.
tasks.location_hint: Italian Garden Restaurant to Tech Solutions office

evidence_schema.description: Catered lunch pickup with order confirmation
Food delivered hot and complete to office
Lunch delivered on time, team satisfied with order completeness

tasks.title: Transport Pet Supplies - Veterinary Emergency
tasks.description: Emergency pet medication needed. Pick up special prescription food and medications from VetMed Supply (147 Animal Ave) and deliver to Happy Paws Veterinary (258 Pet Care Blvd).
tasks.location_hint: VetMed Supply to Happy Paws Veterinary

evidence_schema.description: Veterinary supplies pickup confirmation
Veterinarian or staff delivery receipt
Emergency supplies delivered quickly, proper cold chain maintained if needed
